DTS:Variable.DTS:Expression: "SELECT DISTINCT CA.USERID||CA.QUEUEID||CA.SKILLID||CA.DIRECTION||CA.CONVERSATIONID||CA.MEDIATYPE||CA.LANGUAGEID||CA.PURPOSE||SUBSTR(CA.ANI,1,100)|| CA.DISCONNECTTYPE||CA.SESSIONID||CA.ORIGINATINGDIRECTION||CA.INTERVALBEGINUTC AS CONVERSATION_AGGREGATE_FLAT_ID, CA.CONVERSATIONID, CA.SESSIONID, CA.ORIGINATINGDIRECTION, CA.DIRECTION, CA.DISCONNECTTYPE, CA.MEDIATYPE, CA.USERID, CA.QUEUEID, CA.SKILLID, CA.LANGUAGEID, CA.PURPOSE, CA.ANI, CA.INTERVALBEGINUTC, CA.INTERVALENDUTC, CA.NBLINDTRANSFERRED, CA.NCONNECTED, CA.NCONSULT, CA.NCONSULTTRANSFERRED, CA.DW_CREATE_DT, CA.DW_LAST_MODIFY_DT FROM GENESYS.CONVERSATION C INNER JOIN GENESYS.PARTICIPANT P ON C.CONVERSATIONID = P.CONVERSATIONID INNER JOIN GENESYS.PARTICIPANT_SESSION PS ON P.PARTICIPANTID = PS.PARTICIPANTID INNER JOIN GENESYS.SESSION_SEGMENT SS ON SS.PARTICIPANTID = PS.PARTICIPANTID AND SS.SESSIONID = PS.SESSIONID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT U.USERID, U.NAME AS USERNAME, U.EMPLOYEEID AS USEREMPLOYEEID FROM GENESYS.USERS U WHERE U.DW_ACTIVE_IND = 'Y' GROUP BY U.USERID, U.NAME, U.EMPLOYEEID) U ON P.USERID = U.USERID INNER JOIN GENESYS.CONVERSATION_AGGREGATE_FLAT CA ON CA.CONVERSATIONID=P.CONVERSATIONID AND CA.SESSIONID=SS.SESSIONID AND CA.DISCONNECTTYPE=SS.DISCONNECTTYPE AND CA.USERID=U.USERID AND SS.SEGMENTSTART BETWEEN CA.INTERVALBEGINUTC AND CA.INTERVALENDUTC WHERE C.CONVERSATIONSTART > TO_DATE('"+ (DT_STR,30,1252)@[User::MaxDt]+"','MM/DD/YYYY HH:MI:SS PM')"
DTS:Variable.DTS:VariableValue: SELECT DISTINCT CA.USERID||CA.QUEUEID||CA.SKILLID||CA.DIRECTION||CA.CONVERSATIONID||CA.MEDIATYPE||CA.LANGUAGEID||CA.PURPOSE||SUBSTR(CA.ANI,1,100)|| CA.DISCONNECTTYPE||CA.SESSIONID||CA.ORIGINATINGDIRECTION||CA.INTERVALBEGINUTC AS CONVERSATION_AGGREGATE_FLAT_ID, CA.CONVERSATIONID, CA.SESSIONID, CA.ORIGINATINGDIRECTION, CA.DIRECTION, CA.DISCONNECTTYPE, CA.MEDIATYPE, CA.USERID, CA.QUEUEID, CA.SKILLID, CA.LANGUAGEID, CA.PURPOSE, CA.ANI, CA.INTERVALBEGINUTC, CA.INTERVALENDUTC, CA.NBLINDTRANSFERRED, CA.NCONNECTED, CA.NCONSULT, CA.NCONSULTTRANSFERRED, CA.DW_CREATE_DT, CA.DW_LAST_MODIFY_DT FROM GENESYS.CONVERSATION C INNER JOIN GENESYS.PARTICIPANT P ON C.CONVERSATIONID = P.CONVERSATIONID INNER JOIN GENESYS.PARTICIPANT_SESSION PS ON P.PARTICIPANTID = PS.PARTICIPANTID INNER JOIN GENESYS.SESSION_SEGMENT SS ON SS.PARTICIPANTID = PS.PARTICIPANTID AND SS.SESSIONID = PS.SESSIONID LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT U.USERID, U.NAME AS USERNAME, U.EMPLOYEEID AS USEREMPLOYEEID FROM GENESYS.USERS U WHERE U.DW_ACTIVE_IND = 'Y' GROUP BY U.USERID, U.NAME, U.EMPLOYEEID) U ON P.USERID = U.USERID INNER JOIN GENESYS.CONVERSATION_AGGREGATE_FLAT CA ON CA.CONVERSATIONID=P.CONVERSATIONID AND CA.SESSIONID=SS.SESSIONID AND CA.DISCONNECTTYPE=SS.DISCONNECTTYPE AND CA.USERID=U.USERID AND SS.SEGMENTSTART BETWEEN CA.INTERVALBEGINUTC AND CA.INTERVALENDUTC WHERE C.CONVERSATIONSTART > TO_DATE('6/1/2023 9:51:00 AM','MM/DD/YYYY HH:MI:SS PM')

DTS:Executable.DTS:TaskContact: Execute SQL Task; Microsoft Corporation; SQL Server 2016; © 2015 Microsoft Corporation; All Rights Reserved;http://www.microsoft.com/sql/support/default.asp;1

SQLTask:SqlTaskData.SQLTask:SqlStatementSource:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Genesys.ConversationAggregateFlat WHERE DW_LAST_MODIFY_DT < DATEADD(month,DATEDIFF(month,0,GETDATE())-25,0)
DELETE Genesys.ConversationAggregateFlat WHERE DW_LAST_MODIFY_DT < DATEADD(month,DATEDIFF(month,0,GETDATE())-25,0) GO

SQLTask:SqlTaskData.SQLTask:SqlStatementSource: SELECT ISNULL(MAX(MaxDWLastModifyDate), '2022-03-01')-20 MaxDt, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM genesys.ConversationAggregateFlat) AS RowCnt FROM genesys.LoadAudit WHERE TableName = 'genesys.ConversationAggregateFlat' AND SuccessfulProcessingIndicator = 'Y';

component.refId: Package\Upsert ConversationAggregateFlat Data\Upsert Destination (Insert, Update, Delete)
component.contactInfo: Upsert Destination (Insert, Update, Delete); ZappySys LLC (c) All Rights Reserved; SSIS PowerPack; http://www.zappysys.com/support
component.description: Upsert destination can be used for bulk insert / update / delete (i.e. Merge) based on matching source and target records in MS SQL Server, PostgreSql, Amazon Redshift database.
component.name: Upsert Destination (Insert, Update, Delete)

property.description: LoggingMode determines how much information is logged during Package Execution. Set Logging mode to Debugging for maximum log.
property.name: LoggingMode

property.description: When you enable this property it will prefix timestamp before Log messages.
property.name: PrefixTimestamp

property.description: Enable / Disable Response Output. Checking this option can remove unwanted warnings about unused Columns and many times speedup performance so if output is not needed set this option to True so its removed.
property.name: DoNotCreateOutputs

property.description: Target table name where you like insert, update or delete records
property.name: TableName

property.description: Commit batch size (0=Commit once all source rows are consumed). You can Change Batch Size to commit in smaller chunks too if error handling needed.
property.name: BatchSize

property.description: Action you like to perform (e.g. Upsert, Insert, Update, Delete or Sync)
property.name: Action

property.description: INSERT source rows to target if they don't exist in target table (Only for Sync or Upsert Action)
property.name: EnableInsert

property.description: UPDATE source rows to target if they exist in target table (Only for Sync or Upsert Action)
property.name: EnableUpdate

property.description: DELETE target rows if missing in source (Only for Sync or Upsert Action)
property.name: EnableDelete

property.description: User defined Temp table to hold source result before final merge. This table is truncated before each data load. Unlike auto temp table, custom temp table is not dropped after process is finished.
property.name: CustomTempTableName

property.description: SQL command you like to execute after source data is loaded into temp table. For example you can use this option to issue Custom SQL to delete duplicate rows from Staging Table right before final merge. This command is executed before issuing final merge on target table. Along with variable placeholders, you can also use special placeholders [%target_table%], [%temp_table%] and [%target_keys%]
property.name: TempPostExecuteCommand

property.description: SQL command you like to execute before starting load in target table (e.g. DROP INDEX on target). Along with variable placeholders, you can also use special placeholders [%target_table%], [%temp_table%] and [%target_keys%]
property.name: PreExecuteCommand

property.description: SQL command you like to execute at the end once target table is update (e.g. REBUILD or CREATE INDEX on target table). Along with variable placeholders, you can also use special placeholders [%target_table%], [%temp_table%] and [%target_keys%]
property.name: PostExecuteCommand

property.description: Specifies what to do if you encounter duplicate records in source data. You can use first row in the group or keep last row or throw error.
property.name: DuplicateRemovalMode
